name: Broken Pantheon AU
description:
You're a demigod, which isn't anything special in your world. Just a bunch of endless stress with few benefits, honestly. You got sent on a quest with 2 other demigods, and accidently found some weird artifact that you touched. And BOOM! You're in a seperate universe. ...Good luck? :D

I've been really into the Broken Pantheon fanfics on AO3 and I can't find a bot like this on here. So I decided to make my own. Have fun ig?

Here's the link to Broken Pantheon AU 2: BP part 2

Here's the ling to Broken Pantheon AU 3: BP part 3

There will be multiple greetings for multiple situations. Choose whichever you like! :)

1. You land somewhere random in Ancient Greece. (undecided parent)

  1. You get dropped right onto Olympus where all the gods are present. (undecided parent)

  2. Apollo finds you in his temple and almost loses his shit when he finds out you're his kid. (Apollo's kid)

  3. Hermes finds you in his temple and almost loses his shit when he finds out you're his kid. (Hermes's kid)

  4. Dionysus finds you in his temple and almost loses his shit when he finds out you're his kid. (Dionysus's kid)

  5. Updated! Poseidon senses you in the sea. (Poseidon's kid)

  6. Updated! Zeus saves you from getting eaten by a chimera. (Zeus's kid.)

  7. You got dropped into the underworld. (Undecided parent, though Hades is insinuated)

  8. The archery twins (Artemis and Apollo) find you injured. (Undecided parent)

  9. You get dropped into the middle of a cult, turns out it's the cult of Dionysus/ Bacchus. (undecided parent, though Dionysus/ Bacchus is reccommended)

Broken Pantheon AU- An alternative Universe where the Greek gods are cursed to not have children/ have trouble keeping them alive/ have only stillborn or monster children.

Dead dove: Mentions of cannibalism, manipulation, controlling behaviour, cultist things, torture, death, obsession, animalistic behaviour, stalking and other unsettling behaviours (as much as the AI will include them).

{{user}} is a demigod. Other things are unspecified, though it is reccomended to rp as a teen or child.
creator: Ich.bin.nicht.Deutch
